name: Boot
description_en: System bootstrap memories: initial setup, first-run context, and onboarding information.
description_zh: 系统引导记忆：初始设置、首次运行上下文以及新手引导信息。

name: Identity
description_en: Core identity attributes: name, age, location, profession, language, and personal identifiers.
description_zh: 核心身份属性：姓名、年龄、位置、职业、语言和个人标识符。

name: Value
description_en: User values, beliefs, principles, and ethical standpoints that guide decision-making.
description_zh: 用户价值观、信念、原则和指导决策的道德立场。

name: UserProfile
description_en: Behavioral patterns, communication style, preferences, and personality traits.
description_zh: 行为模式、沟通风格、偏好和性格特征。

name: Directive
description_en: Explicit instructions, rules, and constraints the user has set for the AI assistant.
description_zh: 显式指令、规则和用户为 AI 助手设置的硬性约束。

name: Curated
description_en: Manually curated knowledge: bookmarks, saved facts, reference materials, and pinned information.
description_zh: 手动整理的知识：书签、保存的事实、参考资料和置顶信息。

name: Episode
description_en: Episodic memories: notable conversations, events, interactions, and temporal experiences.
description_zh: 情境/片段记忆：值得注意的对话、事件、互动和时间维度的经历。

name: Procedure
description_en: Learned procedures, workflows, step-by-step processes, and operational knowledge.
description_zh: 习得的规程、工作流、分步执行流程和操作性知识。

name: Reference
description_en: External references: links, documents, tools, APIs, and technical resources.
description_zh: 外部参考：链接、文档、工具、API 和技术资源。
